title: selaginella springii
intro: Selaginella springii, a species of flowering plant in the genus Selaginella, is a type of spore-producing, vascular plant commonly known as a resurrection fern due to its unique ability to revive itself from a dried state. The plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Selaginella springii include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Selaginella springii often involve drying and processing the plant into teas, capsules, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
